(404/MAS) GREGORY QUINTANA W/PET. RESP IN PRO PER. THE COURT DENIES RESP MOTION DUE TO THE FACT THAT HE FILED A REQUEST FOR A STATEMENT OF DECISION, AND IS NOW SAYING T
